card_description: Lady Reporter is a historical figure referenced in Philip K. Dick's Exegesis. Context: "Dick reflects on an interview with a reporter that clarifies his 1974 experience as the "answer" to his lifelong philosophical question "What is real?"."

linked_segments.summary: Dick reflects on an interview with a reporter that clarifies his 1974 experience as the "answer" to his lifelong philosophical question "What is real?". He lists the physical and symbolic "causal fact
